title: Squirrel Removal in Oyster Bay, NY | $900-$2,500
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Oyster Bay, Long Island. Humane trapping, exclusion & damage repair. Licensed experts. Call for fast service: $900-$2,500.
intro: Squirrels are a common nuisance in Oyster Bay's tree-lined neighborhoods, often invading attics and causing damage to historic homes and waterfront properties. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive squirrel removal services throughout Oyster Bay, from Bayville to Mill Neck, protecting your home from these persistent pests. Our humane removal methods ensure squirrels are safely trapped and relocated while preventing future infestations.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Oyster Bay residents for years with licensed, experienced technicians who understand the unique challenges of Long Island's squirrel population. We offer same-day emergency services, lifetime guarantees on exclusion work, and comprehensive solutions that address both removal and prevention to keep your Oyster Bay home squirrel-free.
localContext: Oyster Bay's mature oak and maple trees, historic estates, and waterfront homes create ideal habitats for gray squirrels seeking shelter in attics, chimneys, and soffits. From the Theodore Roosevelt estate area to the charming downtown district, properties throughout Oyster Bay require professional squirrel control to protect against insulation damage, electrical hazards, and structural issues.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Oyster Bay?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Oyster Bay typically costs between $900 and $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of damage repair needed. This includes humane trapping, exclusion work, and sanitation services to ensure complete removal and prevention.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have squirrels in my Oyster Bay attic?
faqs.answer: Common signs include scratching or scurrying sounds in the morning and evening, visible entry holes near the roofline, chewed wood or wires, droppings in the attic, and squirrels running on your roof. Oyster Bay homeowners often notice increased activity during fall and winter when squirrels seek warm shelter.

faqs.question: Are squirrels dangerous to my Oyster Bay home?
faqs.answer: Yes, squirrels can cause significant damage by chewing electrical wiring (creating fire hazards), destroying insulation, damaging roof structures, and contaminating attics with urine and feces. They can also carry parasites and diseases, making professional removal essential for Oyster Bay homeowners.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Oyster Bay property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day emergency service in Oyster Bay and can typically begin trapping immediately. Complete removal usually takes 3-7 days depending on the number of squirrels, followed by exclusion work to seal entry points and prevent re-entry. We service all Oyster Bay neighborhoods including Cove Neck, Centre Island, and Laurel Hollow.
